storyBeat: Mochi 跳上矮牆,看到新書

questions.sentence: I jump on the wall again this evening.
questions.question: When does Mochi jump on the wall?
questions.explanationZh: tonight = 今晚。我每天天黑就來奶奶院子。

questions.sentence: Grandma has a new book in deep sky color.
questions.question: What color is the book?
questions.explanationZh: blue = 藍色。今晚奶奶換了一本藍色封面的書。

questions.sentence: Hana is waiting by her seat.
questions.question: Where is Hana?
questions.explanationZh: Hana 早就在奶奶椅子旁等了。

questions.sentence: The volume with the deep sky cover.
questions.question: What is new tonight?
questions.explanationZh: 藍色封面是今晚的新東西,牆和椅子每晚都在。

questions.sentence: Grandma opens the book. She is ready to say to a tale.
questions.question: Why does she open the book?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶打開書是要說故事給我們聽。

storyBeat: Hana 尾巴拍地等故事

questions.sentence: Hana drums her tail on the floor.
questions.question: What does Hana's tail do?
questions.explanationZh: thump = 拍打發出聲音。Hana 太開心,尾巴啪啪打地板。

questions.sentence: She is set to go for the story.
questions.question: How does she feel?
questions.explanationZh: ready = 準備好了。耳朵立起來,眼睛盯著書。

questions.sentence: I sit beside Hana on the floor.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 我坐在 Hana 旁邊的地板上。wall / fast 是干擾。

questions.sentence: Hana sees me and her tail starts to move fast.
questions.question: Why does her tail move?
options: she is happy to see me
questions.explanationZh: 她看到我就開心,尾巴自己動。

questions.sentence: We both look at Grandma. She is about to open the page.
questions.question: What are we waiting for?
questions.explanationZh: 我跟 Hana 都在等故事開始。

storyBeat: 奶奶說「今晚是桃太郎」

questions.sentence: They called the peach hero by a fruit name.
questions.question: Whose name did you hear?
questions.explanationZh: Momotaro = 桃太郎,日本童話裡的桃子男孩。

questions.sentence: A land many miles from here.
questions.question: Where is the story from?
questions.explanationZh: 從很遠的國家來的故事(日本)。

questions.sentence: She turns to the first page.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 她翻到第一頁。last / open 是干擾。

questions.sentence: In order for us to catch each sound clearly.
questions.question: Why does she read slowly?
options: so we can hear every word
questions.explanationZh: 慢慢念是要讓我們聽清楚每個字。

questions.sentence: In a time very far back.
questions.question: When does the story happen?
questions.explanationZh: long ago = 很久以前,故事的開場套語。

storyBeat: 故事開始:老夫婦住在小村

questions.sentence: A couple who had lived many years.
questions.question: Who lived in the village?
options: an old man and an old woman
optionsZh: 一個老人和一個老婆婆
questions.explanationZh: 故事主角是一對老夫婦。今晚奶奶說的故事從一個小村開始。

questions.sentence: Up to the high ground.
questions.question: Where did he go?
questions.explanationZh: 老爺爺上山割草。河是老奶奶去的,別搞混。

questions.sentence: To clean the family's garments.
questions.question: Why did she go to the river?
questions.explanationZh: 她去河邊洗衣服。

questions.sentence: A little one of their very own.
questions.question: What did the couple wish for?
questions.explanationZh: 他們沒孩子,心裡其實想要一個。

questions.sentence: Broad and easy to see through.
questions.question: What kind of river was it?
questions.explanationZh: 河水又寬又清。

questions.sentence: A wonder was about to come her way.
questions.question: What was about to happen?
questions.explanationZh: 她看到粉紅色的東西,故事要轉折了。

storyBeat: 巨大桃子順流而下

questions.sentence: A pink round fruit.
questions.question: What was in the river?
questions.explanationZh: peach = 桃子。一顆大大的桃子順著河漂下來。

questions.sentence: It was rose-colored and round and very big.
questions.question: What color was it?
questions.explanationZh: pink = 粉紅色。round / small 是形容詞但不是答顏色。

questions.sentence: The peach drifted on the water toward her hands.
questions.question: What does the giant peach do?
questions.explanationZh: float = 漂浮。桃子在水上漂。

questions.sentence: The peach was bigger than her head.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 比她的頭還大。smaller / hand 是干擾。

questions.sentence: The old woman had never seen a peach so big.
questions.question: How did she feel about the peach?
questions.explanationZh: 從沒看過這麼大的桃子,當然驚訝。

questions.sentence: For her partner to enjoy.
questions.question: Why did she want the peach?
questions.explanationZh: 她想拿回去跟老爺爺一起吃。

storyBeat: 老奶奶把桃子抱回家

questions.sentence: She lifted the peach out of the water.
questions.question: What does the old woman do?
questions.explanationZh: lift = 抬起來。她把桃子從水裡抱起來。

questions.sentence: The peach was full of weight in her arms.
questions.question: How did the peach feel?
questions.explanationZh: heavy = 重的。她抱得有點吃力。

questions.sentence: She walked home with the peach.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 她抱著桃子走回家。ran / away 是干擾。

questions.sentence: The old man came home for dinner.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 老爺爺回家吃晚餐。lunch / young 是干擾。

questions.sentence: Sitting up on the cooking top.
questions.question: Where did she put the peach?
questions.explanationZh: 她把桃子放在桌上,要給老爺爺看。

questions.sentence: The old man's eyes grew wide. He had never seen a peach so big.
questions.question: How did the old man react?
questions.explanationZh: 他瞪大眼睛,驚訝得說不出話。

storyBeat: 切開桃子,裡面有個男嬰

questions.sentence: A sharp tool with a handle.
questions.question: What did he take?
questions.explanationZh: knife = 刀。他想把桃子切開來吃。

questions.sentence: The peach opened on its own with a soft crack.
questions.question: How did the peach open?
questions.explanationZh: 桃子自己裂開,不用使力。奶奶的聲音壓低,故事的魔法味來了。

questions.sentence: A tiny new son.
questions.question: Who was inside?
questions.explanationZh: boy = 男孩。桃子裡居然有一個小男嬰。

questions.sentence: The baby wept gentle. The couple held him close.
questions.question: What did the baby do?
questions.explanationZh: 嬰兒小小聲地哭,老夫婦把他抱在懷裡。

questions.sentence: The old woman's eyes were full of tears. She had wanted a child for years.
questions.question: Why was she crying?
questions.explanationZh: 等了好幾年的孩子終於出現,眼淚是高興的。

questions.sentence: The old man whispered, "Heaven has sent him to us."
questions.question: What did he mean?
questions.explanationZh: 他覺得這個孩子是上天給的禮物,不是普通的孩子。

storyBeat: 他們把男孩取名為桃太郎

questions.sentence: They called the peach hero by a fruit name.
questions.question: What name did they choose?
questions.explanationZh: name = 命名。Momo 是桃子,taro 是男孩。

questions.sentence: The hero born from a fruit by the stream.
questions.question: What does the name mean?
questions.explanationZh: 桃太郎的字面意思就是「桃子男孩」,因為他從桃子裡出來。

questions.sentence: They loved him very much.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 他們非常愛他。little / fast 是干擾。

questions.sentence: The old woman fed him warm rice. The old man told him stories.
questions.question: How did they treat him?
questions.explanationZh: 餵飯、說故事,把他當自己的孩子細心養。

questions.sentence: The neighbors heard the news and came to see the boy.
questions.question: Why did the neighbors come?
questions.explanationZh: 鄰居聽到桃子裡出男孩的奇事,都來看新鮮。

questions.sentence: The village had no child like Momotaro before.
questions.question: What was special about him?
questions.explanationZh: 他從桃子裡出來,這個出生方式整村獨一無二。

storyBeat: 桃太郎長大,又強又勇敢

questions.sentence: Momotaro grew up quick.
questions.question: How did he grow?
questions.explanationZh: grow = 長大。他長得比一般孩子快很多。

questions.sentence: He was full of force and full of courage.
questions.question: Which two words did you hear?
questions.explanationZh: strong = 強壯;brave = 勇敢。兩個都是男主角的招牌特質。

questions.sentence: Pick up rocks of much weight.
questions.question: What could he do?
questions.explanationZh: 他力氣大,搬石頭跟搬枕頭一樣。

questions.sentence: Children in the village wanted to play with him.
questions.question: Why did they want to play with him?
questions.explanationZh: 他人緣好,因為又強又對人和氣,不是因為有東西可分。

questions.sentence: He helped his old parents every day. He carried wood and water.
questions.question: What kind of son was he?
questions.explanationZh: 幫忙搬柴挑水,是個會體諒老人的孩子。

questions.sentence: Many seasons passed. He was now a young man.
questions.question: How much time passed?
questions.explanationZh: 年復一年,桃太郎已經長成大人。

storyBeat: 村裡傳來妖怪偷東西的消息

questions.sentence: One day, rotten fresh came to the village.
questions.question: What kind of news was it?
questions.explanationZh: bad news = 壞消息。整村的人都緊張起來。

questions.sentence: Demons came from the sea to steal meal and shiny yellow.
questions.question: What did the demons steal?
questions.explanationZh: demon = 妖怪;steal = 偷。他們把村裡的糧食和金子搶走。

questions.sentence: The demons lived on an island.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 妖怪住在一座島上。river / mountain 是干擾。

questions.sentence: Fear had taken over the town.
questions.question: Why did no one fight the demons?
questions.explanationZh: 妖怪太大太兇,村人光看就怕,沒人敢出手。

questions.sentence: The far place of the dark spirits.
questions.question: What does Onigashima mean?
questions.explanationZh: Oni = 妖怪;shima = 島。Onigashima = 妖怪島。

questions.sentence: Momotaro heard the news and stood up.
questions.question: Why did he stand up?
questions.explanationZh: 他聽完做了決定。站起來不只是動作,是表態。

storyBeat: 桃太郎告訴父母:我要去

questions.sentence: Travel across the sea to the dark spirits.
questions.question: What did he say he would do?
questions.explanationZh: 他親口說要出發,語氣堅定。

questions.sentence: Uneasy yet pleased with him.
questions.question: How did his mother feel?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽兩種情緒同時:擔心孩子的安全,又為他的勇敢驕傲。

questions.sentence: In order to save the town.
questions.question: Why did he want to go?
questions.explanationZh: 他是為了村莊,不是為自己撈金子。

questions.sentence: His father held his shoulder and nodded slowly.
questions.question: What did his father mean?
questions.explanationZh: 點頭就是同意。父親沒多話,動作就是答案。

questions.sentence: His parents said, "Come back without harm. We will wait for you."
questions.question: What did they want most?
questions.explanationZh: 他們最在乎兒子平安回來,不是金子。

questions.sentence: A lengthy walk to somewhere far.
questions.question: What is a journey?
questions.explanationZh: journey = 旅程,通常是很遠的路。妖怪島不近。

storyBeat: 媽媽包黍米糰子當乾糧

questions.sentence: His mother made millet rice balls for him.
questions.question: What did she make?
questions.explanationZh: dumpling = 糰子。日文叫 kibi-dango,是黍米做的小團子。

questions.sentence: She packed them in a gentle fabric.
questions.question: How did she pack them?
questions.explanationZh: pack = 打包。她用布巾包好,方便兒子帶在身上。

questions.sentence: The finest in all the land.
questions.question: How good were the dumplings?
questions.explanationZh: 媽媽的手藝在整個國家是第一名,糰子又香又有勁。

questions.sentence: He took the dumplings and said thank you.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 他接過糰子,跟媽媽道謝。throw / rice 是干擾。

questions.sentence: Riding behind his shoulders.
questions.question: Where did he put the bag?
questions.explanationZh: 把布袋背在背上,走路才方便。

questions.sentence: Gave a parting motion.
questions.question: What did he do as he left?
questions.explanationZh: 他揮手道別,不是頭也不回。離別是平靜的。

storyBeat: 路上遇到一隻狗

questions.sentence: A pup.
questions.question: Who did he meet first?
questions.explanationZh: dog = 狗。第一個夥伴出現了。

questions.sentence: The dog asked, "What is in your bag?"
questions.question: What did the dog ask about?
questions.explanationZh: 狗聞到香味,問袋子裡是什麼。

questions.sentence: They split the small food in two.
questions.question: What did Momotaro do?
questions.explanationZh: share = 分享。他大方分一顆糰子。

questions.sentence: The dog wagged his tail and said, "I will go with you."
questions.question: What did the dog decide?
questions.explanationZh: 狗搖尾巴決定跟他一起去妖怪島,正式成為第一個夥伴。

questions.sentence: A pair, no more.
questions.question: How many were they now?
questions.explanationZh: friend = 朋友。一人加一狗,隊伍從一變兩。

questions.sentence: His nose picks up trouble.
questions.question: What was the dog good at?
questions.explanationZh: 狗鼻子靈,聞得到危險。每隻動物有自己的本事。

storyBeat: 樹上跳下一隻猴子

questions.sentence: A long-tailed climber jumped down from a tree.
questions.question: Who came down?
questions.explanationZh: monkey = 猴子。第二個夥伴從樹上跳下來。

questions.sentence: Both quick of foot and quick of mind.
questions.question: How was the monkey?
questions.explanationZh: quick = 快;clever = 聰明。猴子的招牌組合。

questions.sentence: Momotaro shared one rice ball with him too.
questions.question: What did Momotaro share again?
questions.explanationZh: 他繼續用糰子當見面禮,每個夥伴都有一份。

questions.sentence: Go up the tall stone fence.
questions.question: What would the monkey do?
questions.explanationZh: 猴子最會爬,他答應替隊伍爬上妖怪城牆。

questions.sentence: The dog and the monkey did not fight. They walked side by side.
questions.question: How did the dog and monkey act?
questions.explanationZh: 雖然狗跟猴子常常不合,這趟卻並肩走。團隊已經成形。

questions.sentence: Now they were three. Momotaro smiled.
questions.question: Why did Momotaro smile?
questions.explanationZh: 隊伍越來越大,他知道勝算多了一分。

storyBeat: 天上飛來一隻雉雞

questions.sentence: A bright tail bird flew down from the sky.
questions.question: What kind of bird was it?
questions.explanationZh: pheasant = 雉雞,日本童話的常客。第三個夥伴從天而降。

questions.sentence: Leaf-color and shining yellow.
questions.question: What colors were her feathers?
questions.explanationZh: 雉雞的羽毛是綠跟金的,在陽光下會閃。

questions.sentence: The very final piece.
questions.question: Which dumpling did he share?
questions.explanationZh: 他把最後一個糰子分給她,自己沒留。

questions.sentence: For looking down from high up.
questions.question: What was her job in the team?
questions.explanationZh: 她是空中偵察兵,從上面看,妖怪藏不住。

questions.sentence: Each one with a fresh strength, side by side.
questions.question: Why were they a strong team?
questions.explanationZh: 強的不是誰最大,是技能互補:狗的鼻、猴的手、雉雞的翅膀。

questions.sentence: When the sky turned red.
questions.question: When did they reach the sea?
questions.explanationZh: 夕陽時抵達海邊,故事節奏從陸路轉海路。

storyBeat: 他們搭船橫渡海洋

questions.sentence: They got into a small boat and went across the sea.
questions.question: How does Momotaro's team cross the ocean?
questions.explanationZh: sail = 航行。一行人坐上小船出海。

questions.sentence: Broad and deep sky-color.
questions.question: What was the sea like?
questions.explanationZh: 海又寬又藍,跟一開始的小河完全不同景。

questions.sentence: The wind pushed the boat forward.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 風推著船往前走。back / small 是干擾。

questions.sentence: They saw the dark island in the fog.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 他們在霧裡看到那座黑黑的島。sun / river 是干擾。

questions.sentence: No one spoke. Everyone watched the island grow bigger.
questions.question: Why was everyone quiet?
questions.explanationZh: 靠近敵營,空氣變緊,沒人想開口。

questions.sentence: Momotaro touched his sword and breathed slow.
questions.question: What was he doing?
questions.explanationZh: 摸刀+深呼吸 = 上場前的儀式,他在收心準備打。

storyBeat: 妖怪島的鐵門前

questions.sentence: A tall fence of dark heavy metal.
questions.question: What stood before them?
questions.explanationZh: gate = 大門。鐵做的,又高又冷。

questions.sentence: Held shut with great force.
questions.question: How was the gate?
questions.explanationZh: 鎖得緊緊的,牢得很。

questions.sentence: The monkey climbed over the gate.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 猴子爬過大門。under / fast 是干擾。

questions.sentence: For unlocking the door from the other side.
questions.question: Why did the team need the monkey?
options: to open the gate from inside
questions.explanationZh: 只有猴子能爬上去從裡面開鎖,這是團隊勝利的第一步。

questions.sentence: For watching the dark spirits.
questions.question: Why did the pheasant fly?
questions.explanationZh: 她從上面看妖怪在哪、有幾個,情報先到手。

questions.sentence: The dog stood at the front, ready to bite.
questions.question: What was the dog ready to do?
questions.explanationZh: 狗站最前面,牙齒露出來,他是衝鋒位。

storyBeat: 戰鬥結束,妖怪投降

questions.sentence: Momotaro raised his long sharp blade and shouted.
questions.question: What did Momotaro raise?
questions.explanationZh: 舉刀大喊,是動手的信號。fight = 打鬥。

questions.sentence: The team fought as one and won.
questions.question: How did they win?
questions.explanationZh: 勝利的關鍵是合作,不是誰一個人最猛。

questions.sentence: The demons fell to their knees. They asked for mercy.
questions.question: What did the demons do?
questions.explanationZh: 妖怪跪下求饒,等於投降。

questions.sentence: They returned the shiny yellow and meal they had stolen.
questions.question: What did the demons give back?
questions.explanationZh: gold = 金子。偷的東西全部還回來。

questions.sentence: The demons promised never to cause harm to the town again.
questions.question: What did the demons promise?
options: to give more gold every year
questions.explanationZh: 他們答應不再傷人,不是答應一直送禮。重點是停止作惡。

questions.sentence: Momotaro and his friends sailed home rich and pleased.
questions.question: How did Momotaro feel going home?
questions.explanationZh: 完成承諾,帶著金子和夥伴回家,心是滿的。

storyBeat: 奶奶說:這讓我想到龜兔賽跑

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "That reminds me of the slow one and the fast one."
questions.question: Whose story did Grandma start?
questions.explanationZh: tortoise = 烏龜;hare = 兔子。奶奶順著桃太郎的合作話題,轉到另一個小故事。

questions.sentence: A speed contest.
questions.question: What did they start?
questions.explanationZh: race = 賽跑。兩個動物比誰先到終點。

questions.sentence: The hare ran very fast.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 兔子跑得超快。slow / loud 是干擾。

questions.sentence: The tortoise walked very slowly. But he did not stop.
questions.question: What was special about the tortoise?
questions.explanationZh: 他慢,但從不停下,這才是這故事的重點。

questions.sentence: The hare wondered he had plenty of time. He sat down to rest.
questions.question: Why did the hare rest?
options: he thought he was far ahead
questions.explanationZh: 他覺得贏定了才停下休息。自信過頭是他的弱點。

storyBeat: 慢而穩,烏龜先到終點

questions.sentence: The hare dropped down in a deep rest under a tree.
questions.question: What did the hare do?
questions.explanationZh: 他打盹了。一覺睡過頭。

questions.sentence: The tortoise kept walking pace forward by pace forward.
questions.question: How did the tortoise move?
questions.explanationZh: 一步一步,不快但穩。

questions.sentence: The slow one crossed the line first.
questions.question: Who won the race?
questions.explanationZh: 烏龜先過終點線,贏的人不是跑得最快的。

questions.sentence: The hare woke up too late.
questions.question: Why did the hare lose?
options: he was too sure of himself
questions.explanationZh: 他太有把握就睡著,錯不是腳慢,是心鬆。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "Slow and steady wins the race."
questions.question: What is the lesson?
questions.explanationZh: steady = 穩定。慢也沒關係,別停就好。我跟 Hana 都點點頭。

storyBeat: 牧羊男孩為了好玩說謊

questions.sentence: A shepherd boy watched his soft white flock on the hill.
questions.question: What did the boy watch?
questions.explanationZh: shepherd = 牧羊人。他是顧羊的小孩。

questions.sentence: He was bored. He thought of a joke.
questions.question: How did the boy feel?
questions.explanationZh: 整天看羊很無聊,他想搞點動靜。

questions.sentence: He shouted Wolf to the village.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 他朝村子喊「狼來了」。town / quiet 是干擾。lie = 說謊;cry = 大喊。

questions.sentence: The villagers ran up the hill with sticks.
questions.question: Why did the villagers come?
questions.explanationZh: 他們聽到狼來,衝上來幫忙打狼。

questions.sentence: There was no wolf. The boy laughed loudly.
questions.question: Why did the boy laugh?
options: he was happy to see them
questions.explanationZh: 他笑是因為騙到了大人,把這當成好玩。

storyBeat: 真的狼來了,沒人來救

questions.sentence: He played the same joke a second time.
questions.question: How many times did he lie?
questions.explanationZh: 他又喊一次狼來了,還是假的。

questions.sentence: Then one day, a true gray beast came.
questions.question: What came that day?
questions.explanationZh: 這次是真的狼,不是惡作劇。

questions.sentence: He shouted, "Wolf! Wolf!" But no one came.
questions.question: Why did no one come?
questions.explanationZh: 前面騙太多次,現在沒人信他,即使這次是真的。

questions.sentence: The wolf ate a small share of sheep and ran away.
questions.question: What happened to the sheep?
questions.explanationZh: 有幾隻被狼吃了,代價真實。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "A liar is not heard, even when he tells the truth."
questions.question: What is the lesson?
questions.explanationZh: lie = 說謊。一次騙人,後面說真話也沒人信。我把耳朵壓低,記得這點。

storyBeat: Mochi 聽完故事,奶奶合上書

questions.sentence: Grandma shuts the blue book softly.
questions.question: What does Grandma do with the book?
questions.explanationZh: 輕輕合上書,代表今晚故事結束。

questions.sentence: I look at the brown pup. The pup looks back.
questions.question: Who do I look at?
questions.explanationZh: 故事剛講完狗的角色,我跟 Hana 對望,想笑又不敢笑出聲。

questions.sentence: Grandma scratches her ear gently.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶輕輕搔 Hana 的耳朵。loudly / fast 是干擾。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "Sweet rest, little ones."
questions.question: What does Grandma wish us?
questions.explanationZh: 她跟我們道晚安。

questions.sentence: I leap off the stone fence and walk home in the moonlight.
questions.question: How do I leave?
questions.explanationZh: 每晚我跳上牆來聽,聽完跳下去離開。今晚也一樣。

questions.sentence: The evening of the day after.
questions.question: When will the next story come?
questions.explanationZh: 明晚還有新故事,我會再來。

storyBeat: 番外:Hana 和 Mochi 問奶奶問題

questions.sentence: I look at the brown pup. The pup looks back.
questions.question: Who is asking the question?
questions.explanationZh: Hana 先問:故事裡為什麼有狗?

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "Because pups are true friends, like you."
questions.question: Why was the dog in the story?
questions.explanationZh: loyal = 忠心。奶奶說因為狗很忠誠,就像 Hana 一樣。

questions.sentence: Mochi asks, "Was the shepherd boy real?"
questions.question: What does Mochi want to know?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 想知道桃太郎是不是真的人。

questions.sentence: Grandma smiles, "He lives in the tale. That crafts him true to us."
questions.question: What does Grandma mean?
options: the story makes him real to us
he is a true historical boy
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說,故事裡活著,對聽的人來說他就真實。

questions.sentence: Hana asks, "Why carried out the pink round fruit ride the water?"
questions.question: What is Hana's next question?
questions.explanationZh: Hana 想知道桃子為什麼會漂。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "Peaches are full of soft inside. The soft inside is lighter than water."
questions.question: Why did the peach float?
questions.explanationZh: 桃子裡面有空氣,空氣比水輕,所以浮起來。

questions.sentence: Mochi asks, "Were the dark spirits all bad?"
questions.question: What does Mochi ask about?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 在想:妖怪是不是都壞?

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "They took things from folks. So in the story, yes, they were bad."
questions.question: Why were the demons called bad?
questions.explanationZh: 因為他們偷別人東西,所以是壞的。大小或角不是壞的理由。

questions.sentence: Momotaro core words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: 桃太郎主菜的四個核心詞:peach 桃、float 漂、brave 勇敢、demon 妖怪。

questions.sentence: Companions and ending words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: 三隻夥伴 + 戰利品:dog 狗、monkey 猴、pheasant 雉雞、gold 金子。明晚還會有新故事。
